title: Tired of Ghost Positions in Companies?
full_text:
Complaints are completely anonymous. No registration or credit card required. Though, to ensure uniqueness by network, we compute one-way hash of your IP address when you submit a complaint or vote. 
This cannot be reversed or traced back.

Candidates deserve to know if a company is worth applying to. Easy-apply platforms created a wave of automated screening — and ghost jobs abuse that system. ghostjobs.net exposes companies and recruiters who ghost applicants or harvest their data.

ghostjobs.net lets job seekers research companies before applying — see whether others got responses, made it to interviews, or were ghosted entirely.
